usage_rules.cta_buttons: bg-[#FFD700] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#E6C200] uppercase tracking-wide

grid_system.services: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 auto-rows-[300px]

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 text-lg uppercase font-bold tracking-wider transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 h-12 px-8 uppercase font-bold tracking-wider

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-end p-6 h-full

inputs.default: bg-zinc-50 border-zinc-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary text-zinc-900 h-12

assets.icons: Use Lucide React icons (Wrench, Car, Home, Building, Shovel, Shirt, Trash2, etc.)

sections: Hero: Full screen, dark bg, bold gold text 'FREEMAN MOBILE CLEANING', CTA 'Book Service'
Services Grid: Bento layout of top services
Why Us: 3-column feature list (Reliable, Fast, Professional)
CTA Strip: Yellow background, black text

services_listing.layout: Grid of all 21 services. Each card has icon/image + title + 'Book Now' button.

booking.style: Clean white card on dark background or full white page for focus.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the 'Barlow Condensed' font for all headings to give that industrial/professional look.
Ensure the Gold (#FFD700) is used for primary actions and highlights, but don't overuse it on backgrounds (eye fatigue).
The Booking Flow must be frictionless. No login required.
Use Shadcn UI for the complex interactive elements (Calendar, Dialog, Form) but style them to match the theme (square corners, bold borders).
For the 21 services, if you don't have a specific image for a niche service (e.g., 'Mattress Cleaning'), use a generic 'Home Cleaning' or 'Interior' image from the list or a relevant Lucide Icon.
Implement a 'File Upload' component in the booking form that accepts images.
Ensure mobile responsiveness is perfect - large touch targets for the calendar and time slots.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for the yellow/black theme. Stick to solid, bold colors.
